funnies: A SQL query walks into a bar, sees two tables, and asks: Can I join you?
Did you hear about the mathematician who's afraid of negative numbers? He'll stop at nothing to avoid them.
Did you hear about the restaurant on the moon? Great food, no atmosphere.
How do you follow Will Smith in the snow? You follow the fresh prints!
How do you make a tissue dance? You put a little boogie in it!
How do you organize a space party? You planet!
How does a penguin build its house? Igloos it together!
How does a scientist freshen her breath? With experi-mints!
How many tickles does it take to make an octopus laugh? Ten tickles!
I asked my dog what's two minus two. He said nothing.
I bought shoes from a drug dealer. I don't know what he laced them with, but I've been tripping all day.
I got a job at a bakery because I kneaded dough.
I got a reversible jacket for Christmas. I can't wait to see how it turns out.
I got fired from the calendar factory. I took a day off.
I have a fear of speed bumps, but I'm slowly getting over it.
I have a joke about time travel, but you didn't like it.
I made a pencil with two erasers. It was pointless.
I only know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know y.
I ordered a chicken and an egg from Amazon. I'll let you know which comes first.
I stayed up all night wondering where the sun went. Then it dawned on me.
I told a chemistry joke. There was no reaction.
I told my computer I needed a break. Now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kats.
I told my therapist about my obsession with vengeance. We'll see who gets the last laugh.
I told my wife she should embrace her mistakes. She gave me a hug.
I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
I tried to catch fog yesterday. Mist.
I tried to sue the airport for misplacing my luggage. I lost my case.
I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
I used to be addicted to soap, but I'm clean now.
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
I used to work in a shoe recycling shop. It was sole destroying.
I wondered why the baseball was getting bigger. Then it hit me.
I would avoid the sushi if I were you. It's a little fishy.
I would tell you a joke about an elevator, but it's an uplifting experience!
I'm afraid for the calendar. Its days are numbered.
I'm no good at magic tricks. I can only do bad sleight of hand.
I'm no photographer, but I can picture us together.
I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
I'm reading a book on the history of glue. I just can't seem to put it down.
I'm reading a horror story in Braille. Something bad is going to happen, I can feel it.
I'm terrified of elevators, so I'm taking steps to avoid them.
I'm trying to organize a hide and seek tournament, but it's hard to find good players.
I'm writing a book about hurricanes. It's only a draft.
Parallel lines have so much in common. It's a shame they'll never meet.
Roses are red, violets are blue, I'm schizophrenic, and so am I.
There once was a coder named Dave, whose code was terribly grave, with bugs here and there, and errors everywhere, but at least his commits were brave!
Want to hear a joke about construction? I'm still working on it.

Why can't Monday lift Saturday? It's a weak day!

Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
